scope: parameter-matched single-coordinate-clock control for J1 attribution under the identical five-regime training mixture

mechanism.side_state_corruption: the same t_A and t_L five-regime mixture as C2 is applied to inputs but is not exposed to the denoiser
mechanism.parameter_matching: the element-clock MLP, lattice-clock MLP and fusion map exist in the parameter set but are disconnected from forward
forbidden: using t_A or t_L in forward
changing batch mixture, data order, optimizer, model width or exposure
extra seed, step or hyperparameter search
tensor, topology, reciprocal or flow-matching branches

decision_rule.status: control arm only; scientific attribution is decided by h1a_j1_matched_clock_attribution_v1
decision_rule.boundary: C0 cannot qualify free joint generation, change clipping, or authorize E1/L1/M1/J2, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
